name: ProgressBar
description: ProgressBar (linear bar, real continuous 0-100% fill, 4 colors), ProgressBarLabel (title+percentage+bar+description with an optional Upgrade link, On Top/On Right layouts), and CircularProgressBar (SVG ring computed via stroke-dashoffset, 5 sizes, center percentage label at size >= 56).
sourceNote: Originally built inline inside FileUpload/ (for FileUploadCard's upload progress), then moved into its own shared folder and generalized with a `color` prop when the standalone Progress Bar family was requested. Both the linear and circular bars are genuinely computed from a continuous `percentage` number (CSS width / SVG stroke-dashoffset via circumference math) rather than snapped to Figma's discrete 10%-step / 25%-step raster demo variants. CircularProgressBar's center label only renders at size >= 56 (never at 48), matching the source design exactly.

showLabel.description: Never renders at size=48 regardless of this prop
